sql.query: SELECT id,templateName,description,versionNumber,status FROM tbl_workflow_templates WHERE id=:templateId AND tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1

SELECT s.id,s.stageName,s.description,s.sortOrder,s.status,s.colour,s.requiresAllTasksComplete,CAST(COUNT(t.id) AS UNSIGNED) taskCount FROM tbl_template_stages s INNER JOIN tbl_workflow_templates wt ON wt.id=s.templateId AND wt.tenantId=s.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_template_tasks t ON t.templateStageId=s.id AND t.tenantId=s.tenantId AND t.status='active' WHERE s.templateId=:templateId AND s.tenantId=:tenantId AND s.status<>'archived' GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.sortOrder,s.id

SELECT t.id,t.templateStageId,t.taskName,t.description,t.sortOrder,t.priority,t.status,t.isRequired,t.dueOffsetType,t.dueOffsetDays,t.dueRelation,t.defaultOwnerType,t.defaultOwnerId,tm.teamName AS defaultTeamName FROM tbl_template_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_workflow_templates wt ON wt.id=t.templateId AND wt.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams tm ON tm.id=t.defaultOwnerId AND tm.tenantId=t.tenantId AND t.defaultOwnerType='team' WHERE t.templateId=:templateId AND t.tenantId=:tenantId AND t.status<>'archived' ORDER BY t.templateStageId,t.sortOrder,t.id
SELECT id,teamName FROM tbl_teams WHERE tenantId=:tenantId AND isActive=1 ORDER BY teamName

SELECT d.templateTaskId,d.dependsOnTemplateTaskId,d.dependencyType,prerequisite.taskName dependsOnTaskName FROM tbl_template_task_dependencies d INNER JOIN tbl_template_tasks task ON task.id=d.templateTaskId AND task.tenantId=d.tenantId INNER JOIN tbl_template_tasks prerequisite ON prerequisite.id=d.dependsOnTemplateTaskId AND prerequisite.tenantId=d.tenantId WHERE d.templateId=:templateId AND d.tenantId=:tenantId ORDER BY d.id
